title: 151 Ultra Glue, Extra Strong Household Adhesive, 9 x 3g Tubes
features: VERSATILE ADHESIVE: Bonds effectively with ceramics, rubber, wood, most plastics, fine china, aluminium, jewellery and numerous other household items
TRIPLE PACK VALUE: Contains 3 tubes of 3g each, providing multiple uses and excellent value for household repairs
EXTRA STRONG FORMULA: Professional-strength adhesive that creates powerful, lasting bonds between surfaces
QUICK-BONDING: Forms strong connections within seconds, making repairs fast and efficient
PRECISE APPLICATION: Features easy-to-use tubes with fine tips for accurate, controlled dispensing of the adhesive
description: 151 Ultra Glue is your go-to solution for all household repairs, featuring three 3g tubes of extra-strong adhesive in one convenient pack. This versatile glue effectively bonds a wide range of materials including ceramics, rubber, wood, most plastics, fine china, aluminium and jewellery. The precision applicator ensures accurate dispensing for both small repairs and larger projects. Each tube is designed for quick-bonding action, making your household fixes swift and reliable. The triple pack format offers excellent value, ensuring you always have a spare tube when needed. Important: This powerful adhesive bonds rapidly, so careful application is essential. Please note that this product bonds skin and eyes in seconds, therefore reading the instructions thoroughly before use is crucial. The compact tubes are perfect for storing in your household repair kit, ready for any emergency fixes. Ideal for DIY enthusiasts and practical homeowners looking for a dependable adhesive solution.

specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Ceramics Bonding, China Repair, Plastic Bonding, Rubber Bonding, Wood Bonding
